text: Good evening. Let’s reflect on your day.
How would you describe your day overall?
When things went well today, what made it happen?
options: I prepared well|The team supported me|It just worked out|I adapted quickly

text: When things didn’t go well, what did you do?
options: Tried to control what I could|Waited for someone else|Felt stuck|Just pushed through
answer=I prepared well|I adapted quickly:A1_R_INT;answer=The team supported me|It just worked out:A1_R_MIX
answer=Tried to control what I could|Just pushed through:A1_R_MIX;answer=Waited for someone else|Felt stuck:A1_R_EXT

text: You took ownership of what happened today. That shows strong personal agency.
Some things were in your control, some were not. Noticing your role is the first step to improving it.
Today may have felt controlled by outside factors. Still, there were small choices you made — they matter.

answer=I helped someone|I did my work:A2_Q_CONTRIB;answer=I expected more support|I felt unrecognized:A2_Q_ENTITLE

text: What kind of contribution did you make?
options: Went beyond my role|Helped without being asked|Shared knowledge|Completed tasks well

text: What frustrated you the most?

answer=Went beyond my role|Helped without being asked:A2_R_HIGH;answer=Shared knowledge|Completed tasks well:A2_R_MID
answer=Lack of recognition|No support:A2_R_MID;answer=Others not helping|Too much expectation:A2_R_LOW
